title: rubus hirtus var. setulifer
intro: Rubus hirtus var. setulifer is a variant of the Himalayan raspberry bush, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Rubus hirtus var. setulifer is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots are typically used for medicinal purposes.
